description: Composition Pink tunic with adjustable straps made of a blended fabric, has an embroidered yoke, piping along the neckline and seams, ruched from the yoke down, broad blue tape detailing on the hem and an elasticated mid-back Fit Regular Wash care Dry clean preferred Hand wash in cold water using a mild detergent Flat dry Warm iron on reverse True to its name, global desi specialises in global styles with ethnic Indian threads and print. Combining classic prints with a modern cut to give a slimming silhouette, this Indo-Western top blends cut, colour and the vibrancy of Indian fabrics to create a garment that you can team with chudiars or leggings and stilettos. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
